testcase.name: test_commission_tiers_endpoint

failure.message: TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_batch5_5_fixes.py:40: in test_commission_tiers_endpoint tier_by_level = {t["tier_level"]: t for t in tiers} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_batch5_5_fixes.py:40: in <dictcomp> tier_by_level = {t["tier_level"]: t for t in tiers} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: string indices must be integers, not 'str'
